# Sync with Sift and Fintech Leaders at Money20/20 Las Vegas

Heading to Money20/20 Las Vegas this October? Meet Sift’s fintech fraud experts, engage with leading fintech companies…

![Sift Author Logo](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20504%20504'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Arwen Heredia

Sep 3, 2021

![black-dot](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/black-dot.svg)

![Press-Release-Tile-Image-Color-Pills\_Blue](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201024%20683'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Heading to Money20/20 Las Vegas this October? Meet Sift’s fintech fraud experts, engage with leading fintech companies using Sift to preserve revenue and fuel growth, and join our risk and product leaders for thought leadership sessions and demos throughout the event.

## When and Where to Find Us

Sift will be located at **booth #1301** in the Sands Expo Halls A-D. Stop by to get a quick peek at brand new, fintech-forward features we’ll be releasing in our award-winning Console, and be sure to attend the full product demonstration on **Tuesday, October 26th at 11:30 a.m. on the Town Circle Stage**.

Finally, join Sift Trust & Safety Architect Brittany Allen on Wednesday, October 27th at 11:45 a.m. for her talk, _The Rise of the Deep Web Fraudster_. With recent crackdowns on dark web activities, fraudsters have refocused on the deep web—a large, unindexed corner of the internet—to remain anonymous while executing profitable attacks. 

Allen will examine the payment fraud infiltrating apps like Telegram (including a live demonstration), and share tips for how the entire money ecosystem, from retailers to payment gateways, can proactively stop fraudulent transactions and other attacks emerging from the global Fraud Economy.

**We can’t wait to see you at our speaker sessions! Remember to visit** **booth #1301** **for swag, demos, and opportunities to connect with other fintech leaders.**
